gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.mining: Break ores and stone with pickaxes to gain levels.

gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.excavati: Dig soft blocks with shovels and search for treasures.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.acrobati: Survive dangerous falls and improve your roll chance.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.fishing: Catch fish to improve treasure finds and fishing rewards.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.swords: Fight with swords to improve offensive effects.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.axes: Fight with axes to pressure enemies and break their pace.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.unarmed: Fight bare-handed to improve close-range control.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.archery: Land arrow shots to improve ranged control.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.herbalis: Harvest crops and plants to improve farming efficiency.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.alchemy: Collect finished potions from brewing stands to grow your alchemy skill.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.repair: Repair damaged tools and armor on an anvil to grow Repair.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.smelting: Collect finished furnace outputs to grow Smelting.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.training: Raise Cobblemon through battle to improve training bonuses.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.capture: Catch Cobblemon more reliably as your capture skill grows.
gui.cobblemonmmoskills.overview.breeding: Breed and hatch Cobblemon eggs to improve hatch rewards.
